title: को 4 बड़े भागों में divide करो: ()

categories.name: 31A — Spoken Communication System
categories.intro:
31B — Translation Intelligence System
31C — Real-Life English System
31D — Error Correction & Natural English System

categories.name: यह addition आपके पूरे grammar system को: normal grammar book से उठाकर real English mastery system बना देगा।
categories.intro:
Part 31A — Spoken Communication System
(व्यावहारिक बोलचाल अंग्रेज़ी प्रणाली)
Teacher Introduction
बच्चों, अब तक हमने:
grammar
tense
sentence structure
translation
advanced grammar
समझ लिया।
अब हम: Real Spoken English सीखेंगे।
यह भाग:
बोलने
समझने
प्रतिक्रिया देने
बातचीत करने
के लिए बनाया गया है।

categories.name: Main Goal of Part 31A
categories.intro:
Student:
डर हटाए
तुरंत sentence बना सके
daily English बोल सके
real communication कर सके

categories.name: Included Systems
categories.intro:
1. Daily Spoken Patterns
2. Introduction System
3. Question-Answer System
4. Real-Life Conversation System
5. Functional English System
6. Expression System
7. Confidence Drill System

categories.name: 1. Daily Spoken Patterns
categories.intro: (दैनिक बोलचाल पैटर्न)

categories.name: Basic Patterns
categories.intro:
I am ready.
मैं तैयार हूँ।
I am busy.
मैं व्यस्त हूँ।
I am tired.
मैं थका हुआ हूँ।
I am hungry.
मुझे भूख लगी है।
I am feeling cold.
मुझे ठंड लग रही है।

categories.name: Daily Action Patterns
categories.intro:
I am going home.
मैं घर जा रहा हूँ।
I am studying English.
मैं अंग्रेज़ी पढ़ रहा हूँ।
I am waiting for you.
मैं तुम्हारा इंतजार कर रहा हूँ।

categories.name: Habit Patterns
categories.intro:
I wake up early.
मैं जल्दी उठता हूँ।
I go to school daily.
मैं रोज़ स्कूल जाता हूँ।
I drink tea every morning.
मैं हर सुबह चाय पीता हूँ।

categories.name: Ability Patterns
categories.intro:
I can swim.
मैं तैर सकता हूँ।
She can speak English.
वह अंग्रेज़ी बोल सकती है।
They can help us.
वे हमारी मदद कर सकते हैं।

categories.name: 2. Introduction System
categories.intro: (परिचय प्रणाली)

categories.name: Self Introduction
categories.intro:
My name is Ram.
मेरा नाम राम है।
I am from Bihar.
मैं बिहार से हूँ।
I am a teacher.
मैं एक शिक्षक हूँ।
I live in Patna.
मैं पटना में रहता हूँ।

categories.name: Asking Introduction
categories.intro:
What is your name?
तुम्हारा नाम क्या है?
Where are you from?
तुम कहाँ से हो?
What do you do?
तुम क्या करते हो?

categories.name: Response Practice
categories.intro:
I am a student.
मैं एक विद्यार्थी हूँ।
I work in a school.
मैं एक विद्यालय में काम करता हूँ।

categories.name: 3. Question-Answer System
categories.intro: (प्रश्न-उत्तर प्रणाली)

categories.name: Yes/No Questions
categories.intro:
Do you play cricket?
क्या तुम क्रिकेट खेलते हो?
Yes, I do.
हाँ, मैं खेलता हूँ।
No, I do not.
नहीं, मैं नहीं खेलता।

categories.name: WH Questions
categories.intro:
Where do you live?
तुम कहाँ रहते हो?
I live in Delhi.
मैं दिल्ली में रहता हूँ।

categories.name: Why are you late?
categories.intro:
तुम देर से क्यों आए?
Because I missed the bus.
क्योंकि मेरी बस छूट गई।

categories.name: Daily Question Practice
categories.intro:
What are you doing?
तुम क्या कर रहे हो?
I am studying English.
मैं अंग्रेज़ी पढ़ रहा हूँ।

categories.name: When will you come?
categories.intro:
तुम कब आओगे?
I will come tomorrow.
मैं कल आऊँगा।

categories.name: 4. Real-Life Conversation System
categories.intro: (वास्तविक जीवन वार्तालाप प्रणाली)

categories.name: In Classroom
categories.intro:
May I come in, sir?
क्या मैं अंदर आ सकता हूँ, सर?
Yes, come in.
हाँ, अंदर आओ।
Please sit down.
कृपया बैठ जाओ।

categories.name: At Shop
categories.intro:
How much is this?
यह कितने का है?
It is five hundred rupees.
यह पाँच सौ रुपये का है।

categories.name: Can you reduce the price?
categories.intro: क्या आप कीमत कम कर सकते हैं?

categories.name: On Phone
categories.intro:
Hello, who is speaking?
हैलो, कौन बोल रहा है?
Please call me later.
कृपया मुझे बाद में कॉल करें।

categories.name: Asking for Help
categories.intro:
Can you help me?
क्या आप मेरी मदद कर सकते हैं?
Sure, I will help you.
ज़रूर, मैं आपकी मदद करूँगा।

categories.name: 5. Functional English System
categories.intro: (कार्यात्मक अंग्रेज़ी प्रणाली)

categories.name: Request
categories.intro:
Please help me.
कृपया मेरी मदद करें।
Please open the door.
कृपया दरवाजा खोलिए।

categories.name: Permission
categories.intro:
May I sit here?
क्या मैं यहाँ बैठ सकता हूँ?
May I use your pen?
क्या मैं आपका पेन उपयोग कर सकता हूँ?

categories.name: Suggestion
categories.intro:
You should study hard.
तुम्हें मेहनत से पढ़ना चाहिए।
We should leave now.
हमें अब निकलना चाहिए।

categories.name: Advice
categories.intro:
Do not waste your time.
अपना समय बर्बाद मत करो।
Always speak the truth.
हमेशा सच बोलो।

categories.name: Obligation
categories.intro:
You must obey your parents.
तुम्हें अपने माता-पिता की बात माननी चाहिए।
Students must complete homework.
विद्यार्थियों को गृहकार्य पूरा करना चाहिए।

categories.name: 6. Expression System
categories.intro: (भाव अभिव्यक्ति प्रणाली)

categories.name: Happiness
categories.intro:
I am very happy today.
मैं आज बहुत खुश हूँ।
That is wonderful.
यह बहुत शानदार है।

categories.name: Sadness
categories.intro:
I am feeling sad.
मैं दुखी महसूस कर रहा हूँ।
That is very unfortunate.
यह बहुत दुर्भाग्यपूर्ण है।

categories.name: Surprise
categories.intro:
Really?
सच में?
That is amazing!
यह अद्भुत है!

categories.name: Anger
categories.intro:
Do not disturb me.
मुझे परेशान मत करो।
I am very angry right now.
मैं अभी बहुत गुस्से में हूँ।

categories.name: Politeness
categories.intro:
Thank you very much.
बहुत धन्यवाद।
You are welcome.
आपका स्वागत है।
Sorry for the mistake.
गलती के लिए क्षमा करें।

categories.name: 7. Confidence Drill System
categories.intro: (आत्मविश्वास अभ्यास प्रणाली)

categories.name: Single Pattern Rotation
categories.intro:
I am ready.
मैं तैयार हूँ।
We are ready.
हम तैयार हैं।
He is ready.
वह तैयार है।
They are ready.
वे तैयार हैं।

categories.name: Negative Rotation
categories.intro:
I am not ready.
मैं तैयार नहीं हूँ।
He is not ready.
वह तैयार नहीं है।

categories.name: Interrogative Rotation
categories.intro:
Are you ready?
क्या तुम तैयार हो?
Is he ready?
क्या वह तैयार है?

categories.name: WH Rotation
categories.intro:
Why are you ready?
तुम तैयार क्यों हो?
Why is he angry?
वह गुस्से में क्यों है?

categories.name: Spoken Speed Drill
categories.intro: Slow → Normal → Fast

categories.name: Example
categories.intro:
I am ready.
I am ready.
I’m ready.

categories.name: Common Spoken Contractions
categories.intro:
I am → I’m
He is → He’s
They are → They’re
Do not → Don’t
Will not → Won’t
Cannot → Can’t

categories.name: Real Spoken Understanding
categories.intro:
Formal English: I am going home.
Natural Spoken English: I’m going home.

categories.name: Mini Conversation Drill
categories.intro:
Conversation 1
A: What are you doing?
तुम क्या कर रहे हो?
B: I am studying English.
मैं अंग्रेज़ी पढ़ रहा हूँ।

categories.name: Conversation 2
categories.intro:
A: Where do you live?
तुम कहाँ रहते हो?
B: I live in Patna.
मैं पटना में रहता हूँ।

categories.name: Conversation 3
categories.intro:
A: Can you help me?
क्या आप मेरी मदद कर सकते हैं?
B: Yes, of course.
हाँ, बिल्कुल।

categories.name: Most Important Understanding
categories.intro: Spoken English: grammar + confidence + repetition का combination है।

categories.name: Final Goal of Part 31A
categories.intro:
Student:
daily English बोल सके
conversation कर सके
तुरंत जवाब दे सके
real-life communication कर सके
hesitation कम कर सके
English में सोचना शुरू कर सके।
Part 31B — Translation Intelligence & English Thinking System
(अनुवाद बुद्धिमत्ता एवं अंग्रेज़ी सोच प्रणाली)
Teacher Introduction
बच्चों, translation का मतलब केवल Hindi sentence को English sentence में बदलना नहीं है।
Real translation का मतलब है:
meaning transfer
context understanding
natural expression
English thinking
situation awareness
समझना।
यही कारण है कि कभी grammar सही होने पर भी sentence awkward लगता है, और कभी शब्द बदलने पर भी meaning पूरी तरह गलत हो जाती है।

categories.name: Main Goal of Part 31B
categories.intro:
Student:
word-by-word translation से बाहर निकले
Hindi-thinking mistakes पहचान सके
contextual English समझ सके
natural English बोल सके
awkward English से बच सके
English expression system समझ सके
different verbs and expressions का सही use सीख सके

categories.name: Included Systems in Part 31B
categories.intro:
1. Direct Translation System
2. Raw Literal Translation System
3. Grammatical Literal Translation System
4. Contextual Translation System
5. Natural English Translation System
6. Translation Psychology System
7. Hindi vs English Thinking System
8. Similar Verb Difference System
9. Figurative Hindi Expression System
10. Indian English vs Global English System
11. Environment-Based Translation System
12. Real-Life Translation Drill System

categories.name: 1. Direct Translation System
categories.intro:
(प्रत्यक्ष अनुवाद प्रणाली)
English Definition
Direct translation means translating a sentence directly from one language into another language.
Hindi Definition
जब किसी वाक्य का सीधे दूसरी भाषा में अनुवाद किया जाए, उसे direct translation कहते हैं।
Important Understanding
Direct translation कभी सही होता है, कभी गलत।
Simple factual sentences में यह अक्सर ठीक काम करता है।
Examples
राम स्कूल जाता है।
✅ Ram goes to school.
मैं किताब पढ़ रहा हूँ।
✅ I am reading a book.

categories.name: 2. Raw Literal Translation System
categories.intro:
(कच्चा शब्दशः अनुवाद)
English Definition
Raw literal translation means translating every word directly without caring about grammar, context, or natural expression.
Hindi Definition
जब grammar, context और natural usage की चिंता किए बिना हर शब्द का सीधा अनुवाद किया जाए, उसे raw literal translation कहते हैं।
Examples
सड़क पर गोलियाँ चल रही हैं।
❌ Bullets are walking on the road.
वहाँ पानी ही पानी था।
❌ There was water water.
उसने मेरी नाक में दम कर दिया।
❌ He filled breath in my nose.
Literal Hindi Meaning of These Wrong English Lines
Bullets are walking on the road.
→ गोलियाँ सड़क पर चल रही हैं।
There was water water.
→ वहाँ पानी पानी था।
He filled breath in my nose.
→ उसने मेरी नाक में साँस भर दी।
Important Understanding
Raw literal translation language psychology समझने के लिए useful है, लेकिन real English नहीं होता।

categories.name: 3. Grammatical Literal Translation System
categories.intro:
(व्याकरणिक शब्दशः अनुवाद)
English Definition
Grammatical literal translation follows grammar rules but may still sound unnatural.
Hindi Definition
जब grammar सही हो लेकिन expression natural न लगे, उसे grammatical literal translation कहते हैं।
Examples
सड़क पर गोलियाँ चल रही हैं।
⚠️ Bullets are moving on the road.
वहाँ पानी ही पानी था।
⚠️ There was only water.
मेरी बस छूट गई।
⚠️ The bus left without me.
Why Weak?
Grammar ठीक है
लेकिन English natural नहीं लग रहा
Hindi expression का real feeling नहीं आ रहा

categories.name: 4. Contextual Translation System
categories.intro:
(संदर्भगत अनुवाद प्रणाली)
English Definition
Contextual translation translates meaning according to the situation and context rather than exact words.
Hindi Definition
जब शब्दों के बजाय परिस्थिति, अर्थ और context के अनुसार अनुवाद किया जाए, उसे contextual translation कहते हैं।
Examples
सड़क पर गोलियाँ चल रही हैं।
✅ There is firing on the road.
✅ Gunfire is going on in the street.
✅ Gunfire erupted in the street.
वहाँ पानी ही पानी था।
✅ There was water everywhere.
✅ There was nothing but water.
मेरी बस छूट गई।
✅ I missed my bus.
Important Understanding
Translation:
शब्द बदलना नहीं
meaning transfer करना है

categories.name: 5. Natural English Translation System
categories.intro:
(प्राकृतिक अंग्रेज़ी अनुवाद प्रणाली)
English Definition
Natural English translation focuses on how native speakers naturally express the idea.
Hindi Definition
जब translation native speakers के natural expression के अनुसार किया जाए, उसे natural English translation कहते हैं।
Examples
मुझे ठंड लग रही है।
❌ Cold is feeling to me.
✅ I am feeling cold.
✅ I feel cold.
मुझे नींद आ रही है।
❌ Sleep is coming to me.
✅ I am feeling sleepy.
✅ I feel sleepy.
मुझे डर लग रहा है।
❌ Fear is feeling to me.
✅ I am feeling scared.
✅ I feel scared.
Important Understanding
Natural English: Hindi copy नहीं करती।

categories.name: 6. Translation Psychology System
categories.intro:
(अनुवाद मनोविज्ञान प्रणाली)
Common Problems
Hindi-medium learner अक्सर:
word-by-word सोचता है
Hindi structure copy करता है
dictionary meaning directly use करता है
wrong verb चुनता है
literal logic पर अटक जाता है
Example
उसने मेरी नाक में दम कर दिया।
❌ He filled breath in my nose.
✅ He irritated me a lot.
✅ He troubled me badly.
Important Understanding
हर language का:
अपना culture
अपना logic
अपना expression system
होता है।

categories.name: 7. Hindi vs English Thinking System
categories.intro:
(हिंदी एवं अंग्रेज़ी सोच प्रणाली)
Hindi Structure
Subject + Object + Verb
Example
मैं चाय पीता हूँ।
मैं → subject
चाय → object
पीता हूँ → verb
English Structure
Subject + Verb + Object
Example
I drink tea.
I → subject
drink → verb
tea → object
Important Understanding
Hindi: SOV Structure
English: SVO Structure

categories.name: 8. Similar Verb Difference System
categories.intro:
(समान क्रियाओं का अंतर प्रणाली)
A. Learn vs Study
Learn
skill acquire करना
I am learning English.
मैं English सीख रहा हूँ।
Study
किसी subject को पढ़ना
I am studying English grammar.
मैं English grammar पढ़ रहा हूँ।
Important Difference
You can study without learning.
तुम पढ़ सकते हो, लेकिन सीखना जरूरी नहीं।

categories.name: B. Drink Tea / Have Tea / Take Tea
categories.intro:
I drink tea.
✅ Modern global English
✅ Direct spoken usage
✅ Most common and simple
मैं चाय पीता हूँ।
I have tea.
✅ Very natural daily conversation
मैं चाय पीता / लेता हूँ।
I take tea.
⚠️ Traditional / formal / polite / old-style expression
⚠️ Some British/Indian contexts में used हो सकता है
मैं चाय लेता हूँ।
Important Difference
ExpressionUsage
I drink teadirect modern global usage
I have teamost natural daily conversation
I take teaformal/traditional/polite usage
Important Understanding
English में drink का अर्थ: liquid consume करना होता है।
इसलिए “I drink tea” गलत नहीं है। यह बिल्कुल सही और natural है।

categories.name: C. Hear vs Listen
categories.intro:
Hear
automatic hearing
I heard a noise.
मैंने आवाज सुनी।
Listen
attention देकर सुनना
Listen to me carefully.
ध्यान से मेरी बात सुनो।

categories.name: D. See vs Look vs Watch
categories.intro:
See
अपने आप दिखाई देना
I can see a bird.
मैं एक पक्षी देख सकता हूँ।
Look
जानबूझकर देखना
Look at the board.
बोर्ड की ओर देखो।
Watch
लगातार ध्यान से देखना
We are watching television.
हम टेलीविजन देख रहे हैं।

categories.name: E. Say vs Tell
categories.intro:
Say
कुछ कहना
He said something.
उसने कुछ कहा।
Tell
किसी को कुछ बताना
He told me the truth.
उसने मुझे सच बताया।

categories.name: F. Bring vs Take
categories.intro:
Bring
speaker की ओर लाना
Bring me a glass of water.
मेरे लिए एक गिलास पानी लाओ।
Take
speaker से दूर ले जाना
Take this bag to the room.
यह बैग कमरे में ले जाओ।

categories.name: 9. Figurative Hindi Expression System
categories.intro:
(लाक्षणिक हिंदी अभिव्यक्ति प्रणाली)
What is Figurative Expression?
ऐसे expressions जिनका अर्थ सीधे शब्दों से नहीं निकलता।
Examples
1
वहाँ पानी ही पानी था।
Raw Literal: ❌ There was water water.
Better Contextual: ✅ There was water everywhere.
More Intense/Complete: ✅ There was nothing but water.
2
उसने मेरी नाक में दम कर दिया।
Raw Literal: ❌ He filled breath in my nose.
Natural English: ✅ He irritated me badly.
Natural English: ✅ He troubled me a lot.
3
जान पर बन आई।
Raw Literal: ❌ It came on life.
Natural English: ✅ Life was in danger.
4
उसकी आँखों में आँसू भर आए।
Raw Literal: ❌ Tears filled in his eyes.
Better English: ✅ His eyes filled with tears.
Important Understanding
Idiomatic Hindi: directly translate नहीं होती।

categories.name: 10. Indian English vs Global English System
categories.intro:
(भारतीय अंग्रेज़ी एवं वैश्विक अंग्रेज़ी)
Examples
❌ He expired.
✅ He died.
❌ I am having two brothers.
✅ I have two brothers.
❌ Discuss about this topic.
✅ Discuss this topic.
❌ Return back.
✅ Return.
❌ Revert back.
✅ Reply.
Important Understanding
कुछ expressions Indian English में common हैं, लेकिन global natural English में awkward या गलत माने जाते हैं।

categories.name: 11. Environment-Based Translation System
categories.intro:
(परिस्थिति-आधारित अनुवाद प्रणाली)
एक ही Hindi sentence के अलग-अलग English versions हो सकते हैं, context के अनुसार।
Example
सड़क पर गोलियाँ चल रही हैं।
Spoken English
✅ There is firing on the road.
News English
✅ Gunfire erupted in the street.
Formal Reporting English
✅ Gunshots were being fired in the area.
Emotional English
✅ The whole street echoed with gunfire.
Important Understanding
एक ही sentence: situation के अनुसार अलग English ले सकता है।

categories.name: 12. Real-Life Translation Drill System
categories.intro:
(वास्तविक जीवन अनुवाद अभ्यास)
Daily Sentences
मैं घर जा रहा हूँ।
✅ I am going home.
मैं तुम्हारा इंतजार कर रहा हूँ।
✅ I am waiting for you.
वह स्कूल नहीं गया।
✅ He did not go to school.
क्या तुम मुझे जानते हो?
✅ Do you know me?
मैं दो घंटे से पढ़ रहा हूँ।
✅ I have been studying for two hours.
पुलिस के आने से पहले चोर भाग चुका था।
✅ The thief had escaped before the police arrived.
जब मैं घर पहुँचा, मेरी माँ खाना बना रही थी।
✅ When I reached home, my mother was cooking food.

categories.name: Final Translation Intelligence Formula
categories.intro:
Grammar
+
Meaning
+
Context
+
Natural Usage
+
English Thinking
+
Situation Awareness
Real English Translation

categories.name: Final Goal of Part 31B
categories.intro:
Student:
direct और contextual translation का अंतर समझ सके
raw literal गलती पहचान सके
natural English सोच सके
real-life translation कर सके
awkward English से बच सके
similar verbs का सही use सीख सके
Hindi-thinking mistakes सुधार सके
global English बोल सके

categories.name: One-Page Smart Memory Core
categories.intro:
Translation Levels
1. Direct Translation
2. Raw Literal Translation
3. Grammatical Literal Translation
4. Contextual Translation
5. Natural English Translation
Most Important Rule
Translation = meaning transfer
Not just word replacement
Most Important Habit
पहले meaning सोचो, फिर English बनाओ
Most Important Outcome
Student Hindi से English copy नहीं करेगा, बल्कि English में सोचना शुरू करेगा।
Part 31C — Real-Life English Application System
(वास्तविक जीवन अंग्रेज़ी प्रयोग प्रणाली)
Teacher Introduction
बच्चों, अब तक हमने:
grammar
tense
spoken English
translation intelligence
English thinking
समझ लिया।
अब हम सीखेंगे:
Real-Life English Application
यानी: असली जीवन में English कैसे उपयोग होती है।
यह भाग:
communication
social interaction
practical English
real environment English
के लिए बनाया गया है।

categories.name: Main Goal of Part 31C
categories.intro:
Student:
real-life English use कर सके
situation के अनुसार English बदल सके
formal और informal English समझ सके
practical communication कर सके
environment-based English बोल सके

categories.name: Included Systems
categories.intro:
1. Formal vs Informal English
2. Social English System
3. Phone Conversation System
4. Public Place English System
5. Emotion-Based English System
6. Politeness & Respect System

8. Survival English System
9. Conversation Expansion System
10. Real-Life Situation Drill System

categories.name: 1. Formal vs Informal English
categories.intro: (औपचारिक एवं अनौपचारिक अंग्रेज़ी)

categories.name: Informal English
categories.intro: दोस्तों, परिवार या close लोगों के साथ।

categories.name: Examples
categories.intro:
What’s up?
क्या हाल है?
I’m fine.
मैं ठीक हूँ।
See you later.
फिर मिलते हैं।

categories.name: Formal English
categories.intro: teacher, office, interview, stranger आदि के साथ।

categories.name: Examples
categories.intro:
How are you doing?
आप कैसे हैं?
I am doing well.
मैं अच्छा हूँ।
It was nice meeting you.
आपसे मिलकर अच्छा लगा।

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro:
हर जगह same English नहीं बोली जाती।
Situation के अनुसार: tone बदलता है।

categories.name: 2. Social English System
categories.intro: (सामाजिक अंग्रेज़ी प्रणाली)

categories.name: Greeting
categories.intro:
Good morning.
सुप्रभात।
Good evening.
शुभ संध्या।

categories.name: Welcoming
categories.intro:
Welcome.
स्वागत है।
Please come in.
कृपया अंदर आइए।

categories.name: Thanking
categories.intro:
Thank you very much.
बहुत धन्यवाद।
I really appreciate it.
मैं वास्तव में इसकी सराहना करता हूँ।

categories.name: Apology
categories.intro:
I am sorry.
मुझे क्षमा करें।
Please forgive me.
कृपया मुझे माफ करें।

categories.name: Congratulation
categories.intro:
Congratulations!
बधाई हो!
Well done!
बहुत बढ़िया!

categories.name: 3. Phone Conversation System
categories.intro: (फोन वार्तालाप प्रणाली)

categories.name: Starting Call
categories.intro:
Hello, who is speaking?
हैलो, कौन बोल रहे हैं?
May I speak to Ram?
क्या मैं राम से बात कर सकता हूँ?

categories.name: During Conversation
categories.intro:
Please speak slowly.
कृपया धीरे बोलिए।
I cannot hear you properly.
मैं आपको ठीक से सुन नहीं पा रहा हूँ।

categories.name: Ending Call
categories.intro:
I will call you later.
मैं आपको बाद में कॉल करूँगा।
Take care.
अपना ध्यान रखिए।

categories.name: 4. Public Place English System
categories.intro: (सार्वजनिक स्थान अंग्रेज़ी प्रणाली)

categories.name: At Shop
categories.intro:
How much is this?
यह कितने का है?
Can you reduce the price?
क्या आप कीमत कम कर सकते हैं?

categories.name: At Station
categories.intro:
When will the train arrive?
ट्रेन कब आएगी?
Which platform is it on?
यह किस प्लेटफॉर्म पर है?

categories.name: At Restaurant
categories.intro:
May I see the menu?
क्या मैं menu देख सकता हूँ?
I would like some tea.
मुझे चाय चाहिए।

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Real-life English: book grammar से अलग feel देती है।

categories.name: 5. Emotion-Based English System
categories.intro: (भाव आधारित अंग्रेज़ी प्रणाली)

categories.name: Happiness
categories.intro:
I am very happy today.
मैं आज बहुत खुश हूँ।
That’s wonderful!
यह बहुत शानदार है!

categories.name: Sadness
categories.intro:
I feel very sad.
मैं बहुत दुखी महसूस कर रहा हूँ।
That is unfortunate.
यह दुर्भाग्यपूर्ण है।

categories.name: Anger
categories.intro:
I am very angry.
मैं बहुत गुस्से में हूँ।
Do not disturb me.
मुझे परेशान मत करो।

categories.name: Fear
categories.intro:
I am scared.
मैं डरा हुआ हूँ।
Something feels wrong.
कुछ गलत लग रहा है।

categories.name: Surprise
categories.intro:
Really?
सच में?
That’s unbelievable!
यह अविश्वसनीय है!

categories.name: 6. Politeness & Respect System
categories.intro: (विनम्रता एवं सम्मान प्रणाली)

categories.name: Request
categories.intro:
Please help me.
कृपया मेरी मदद करें।
Could you open the door?
क्या आप दरवाजा खोल सकते हैं?

categories.name: Permission
categories.intro:
May I come in?
क्या मैं अंदर आ सकता हूँ?
May I ask a question?
क्या मैं एक प्रश्न पूछ सकता हूँ?

categories.name: Respectful English
categories.intro:
Would you mind sitting here?
क्या आपको यहाँ बैठने में आपत्ति होगी?
Could you please repeat that?
क्या आप कृपया उसे दोहरा सकते हैं?

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: English में: politeness level बहुत महत्वपूर्ण है।

categories.name: 7. Reaction English System
categories.intro: (प्रतिक्रिया अंग्रेज़ी प्रणाली)

categories.name: Agreement
categories.intro:
You are right.
आप सही हैं।
I agree with you.
मैं आपसे सहमत हूँ।

categories.name: Disagreement
categories.intro:
I do not think so.
मैं ऐसा नहीं सोचता।
I disagree with you.
मैं आपसे असहमत हूँ।

categories.name: Shock
categories.intro:
Oh my God!
हे भगवान!
That is shocking!
यह चौंकाने वाला है!

categories.name: Excitement
categories.intro:
Amazing!
अद्भुत!
Fantastic!
शानदार!

categories.name: 8. Survival English System
categories.intro: (जीवनोपयोगी अंग्रेज़ी प्रणाली)

categories.name: Asking Direction
categories.intro:
How can I go to the station?
मैं स्टेशन कैसे जा सकता हूँ?

categories.name: Emergency
categories.intro:
Please help me!
कृपया मेरी मदद करें!
Call the police!
पुलिस को बुलाइए!

categories.name: Health
categories.intro:
I am not feeling well.
मैं अच्छा महसूस नहीं कर रहा हूँ।
I need a doctor.
मुझे डॉक्टर चाहिए।

categories.name: Travel
categories.intro:
I need a ticket to Delhi.
मुझे दिल्ली का टिकट चाहिए।
Where is the bus stop?
बस स्टॉप कहाँ है?

categories.name: 9. Conversation Expansion System
categories.intro: (वार्तालाप विस्तार प्रणाली)

categories.name: Short Answer
categories.intro: Yes.

categories.name: Better Answer
categories.intro: Yes, I do.

categories.name: More Natural Answer
categories.intro: Yes, I usually do that in the evening.

categories.name: Example
categories.intro: Do you drink tea?

categories.name: Basic Answer
categories.intro: Yes.

categories.name: Better Answer
categories.intro: Yes, I drink tea.

categories.name: Expanded Answer
categories.intro: Yes, I usually have tea in the morning with my family.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Real conversation: single-word answer से आगे बढ़ती है।

categories.name: 10. Real-Life Situation Drill System
categories.intro: (वास्तविक परिस्थिति अभ्यास प्रणाली)

categories.name: Situation 1 — Asking Help
categories.intro:
Excuse me, can you help me?
माफ कीजिए, क्या आप मेरी मदद कर सकते हैं?
Yes, what happened?
हाँ, क्या हुआ?

categories.name: Situation 2 — At School
categories.intro:
May I come in, sir?
क्या मैं अंदर आ सकता हूँ, सर?
Yes, come in.
हाँ, अंदर आओ।

categories.name: Situation 3 — At Market
categories.intro:
How much is this shirt?
यह शर्ट कितने की है?
It is five hundred rupees.
यह पाँच सौ रुपये की है।

categories.name: Situation 4 — On Phone
categories.intro:
Hello, who is speaking?
हैलो, कौन बोल रहे हैं?
This is Ram speaking.
मैं राम बोल रहा हूँ।

categories.name: Situation 5 — Emergency
categories.intro:
Please help me!
कृपया मेरी मदद करें!
What happened?
क्या हुआ?

categories.name: Final Real-Life Communication Formula
categories.intro:
Grammar
+
Confidence
+
Context
+
Politeness
+
Natural Expression
Real Communication Ability

categories.name: Final Goal of Part 31C
categories.intro:
Student:
real-life English बोल सके
situation-based English समझ सके
formal/informal difference पहचान सके
polite communication कर सके
daily conversation कर सके
practical English use कर सके
public interaction में confidence ला सके।
Part 31D — Error Correction & Natural English Mastery System
(त्रुटि सुधार एवं प्राकृतिक अंग्रेज़ी निपुणता प्रणाली)
Teacher Introduction
बच्चों, अब तक हमने:
grammar
tense
spoken English
translation intelligence
real-life communication
समझ लिया।
अब हम सीखेंगे:
Error Correction & Natural English Mastery
यानी:
गलत English पहचानना
awkward English सुधारना
natural English बनाना
native-like expression समझना

categories.name: Main Goal of Part 31D
categories.intro:
Student:
grammar mistakes पहचान सके
translation mistakes सुधार सके
awkward English से बच सके
natural English बोल सके
Indian-English errors समझ सके
real communication improve कर सके

categories.name: Included Systems
categories.intro:
1. Grammar Error Correction System
2. Translation Error Correction System
3. Natural English Upgrade System
4. Awkward vs Natural English System
5. Indian English Error System
6. Verb Usage Error System
7. Word Order Error System
8. Real Spoken English Compression System
9. Meaning Confusion System
10. Final Master Correction Drill System

categories.name: 1. Grammar Error Correction System
categories.intro: (व्याकरण त्रुटि सुधार प्रणाली)

categories.name: Example 1
categories.intro:
❌ He do not play cricket.
✅ He does not play cricket.

categories.name: Why Wrong?
categories.intro: He/she/it के साथ: does उपयोग होता है।

categories.name: Example 2
categories.intro:
❌ She go to school daily.
✅ She goes to school daily.

categories.name: Example 3
categories.intro:
❌ I am study English.
✅ I am studying English.

categories.name: Why Wrong?
categories.intro: am/is/are के बाद: V4 आता है।

categories.name: Example 4
categories.intro:
❌ They was playing football.
✅ They were playing football.

categories.name: 2. Translation Error Correction System
categories.intro: (अनुवाद त्रुटि सुधार प्रणाली)

categories.name: Example 1
categories.intro:
मुझे भूख लगी है।
❌ Hunger has attached to me.
✅ I am hungry.

categories.name: Example 2
categories.intro:
मुझे ठंड लग रही है।
❌ Cold is feeling to me.
✅ I am feeling cold.
✅ I feel cold.

categories.name: Example 3
categories.intro:
उसने मेरी नाक में दम कर दिया।
❌ He filled breath in my nose.
✅ He irritated me a lot.
✅ He troubled me badly.

categories.name: Example 4
categories.intro:
सड़क पर गोलियाँ चल रही हैं।
❌ Bullets are walking on the road.
⚠️ Bullets are moving on the road.
✅ There is firing on the road.
✅ Gunfire is going on in the street.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: हर गलत sentence: same level की गलती नहीं होता।

categories.name: Error Levels
categories.intro:
TypeMeaning
Raw Literal Errorशब्दशः गलती
Grammar Errorव्याकरण गलती
Context Errorपरिस्थिति गलती
Naturalness Errorunnatural English

categories.name: 3. Natural English Upgrade System
categories.intro: (प्राकृतिक अंग्रेज़ी उन्नयन प्रणाली)

categories.name: Example 1
categories.intro:
⚠️ I drink tea.
✅ I have tea.
✅ I usually have tea in the evening.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro:
“I drink tea” गलत नहीं है।
लेकिन: “I have tea” daily natural conversation में ज्यादा common है।

categories.name: Example 2
categories.intro:
⚠️ I am very tired.
✅ I am exhausted.

categories.name: Example 3
categories.intro:
⚠️ He is very angry.
✅ He is furious.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Natural English: कई बार छोटे simple words की जगह strong natural expressions use करती है।

categories.name: 4. Awkward vs Natural English System
categories.intro: (अस्वाभाविक एवं प्राकृतिक अंग्रेज़ी प्रणाली)

categories.name: Example 1
categories.intro:
⚠️ The bus left without me.
✅ I missed my bus.

categories.name: Example 2
categories.intro:
⚠️ Sleep is coming to me.
✅ I feel sleepy.

categories.name: Example 3
categories.intro:
⚠️ Fear is feeling to me.
✅ I feel scared.

categories.name: Example 4
categories.intro:
⚠️ Tears filled in his eyes.
✅ His eyes filled with tears.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Grammar सही होने पर भी: sentence awkward हो सकता है।

categories.name: 5. Indian English Error System
categories.intro: (भारतीय अंग्रेज़ी त्रुटि प्रणाली)

categories.name: Example 1
categories.intro:
❌ He expired.
✅ He died.

categories.name: Example 2
categories.intro:
❌ Discuss about this topic.
✅ Discuss this topic.

categories.name: Example 3
categories.intro:
❌ Return back.
✅ Return.

categories.name: Example 4
categories.intro:
❌ Revert back.
✅ Reply.

categories.name: Example 5
categories.intro:
❌ I am having two brothers.
✅ I have two brothers.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: कुछ expressions: India में common हैं, लेकिन: global English में awkward माने जाते हैं।

categories.name: 6. Verb Usage Error System
categories.intro: (क्रिया प्रयोग त्रुटि प्रणाली)

categories.name: Wrong Understanding
categories.intro: ❌ Both are same.

categories.name: Correct Understanding
categories.intro:
Learn
→ skill development
Study
→ subject reading

categories.name: Example
categories.intro:
I am learning English.
मैं English सीख रहा हूँ।
I am studying English grammar.
मैं English grammar पढ़ रहा हूँ।

categories.name: Drink vs Have vs Take Tea
I drink tea.
categories.intro: ✅ Modern global English

categories.name: I have tea.
categories.intro: ✅ Most natural daily English

categories.name: I take tea.
categories.intro: ⚠️ formal/traditional/British-style usage

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: English verbs: Hindi physical logic से नहीं, native usage pattern से चलते हैं।

categories.name: Hear vs Listen
categories.intro:
hear
→ automatic hearing
listen
→ attention-based hearing

categories.name: See vs Look vs Watch
categories.intro:
see
→ naturally visible
look
→ intentionally see
watch
→ continuously observe

categories.name: 7. Word Order Error System
categories.intro: (शब्द क्रम त्रुटि प्रणाली)

categories.name: Hindi Structure
categories.intro: Subject + Object + Verb

categories.name: English Structure
categories.intro: Subject + Verb + Object

categories.name: Example 1
categories.intro:
❌ I tea drink.
✅ I drink tea.

categories.name: Example 2
categories.intro:
❌ He English learning is.
✅ He is learning English.

categories.name: Example 3
categories.intro:
❌ I market going am.
✅ I am going to the market.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Hindi word order: English में copy नहीं होता।

categories.name: 8. Real Spoken English Compression System
categories.intro: (वास्तविक बोलचाल संक्षिप्तीकरण प्रणाली)

categories.name: Formal English
categories.intro: I am going home.

categories.name: Spoken English
categories.intro: I’m going home.

categories.name: Formal English
categories.intro: Do not worry.

categories.name: Spoken English
categories.intro: Don’t worry.

categories.name: Formal English
categories.intro: I will not do this.

categories.name: Spoken English
categories.intro: I won’t do this.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro: Native speakers: हर शब्द clearly नहीं बोलते।

categories.name: 9. Meaning Confusion System
categories.intro: (अर्थ भ्रम प्रणाली)

categories.name: Example 1
categories.intro:
❌ He is reading in class ten.
⚠️ Indian English
✅ He studies in class ten.

categories.name: Example 2
categories.intro:
❌ Open the light.
✅ Turn on the light.

categories.name: Example 3
categories.intro:
❌ Close the fan.
✅ Turn off the fan.

categories.name: Example 4
categories.intro:
❌ My head is paining.
✅ I have a headache.

categories.name: Important Understanding
categories.intro:
Dictionary meaning जानना काफी नहीं है।
Correct usage भी जरूरी है।

categories.name: 10. Final Master Correction Drill System
categories.intro: (अंतिम महारत अभ्यास प्रणाली)

categories.name: Correct the Sentence
categories.intro:
❌ He do not know me.
✅ He does not know me.

categories.name: ❌ I am having a car.
categories.intro: ✅ I have a car.

categories.name: ❌ Bullets are walking on the road.
categories.intro: ✅ There is firing on the road.

categories.name: ❌ Sleep is coming to me.
categories.intro: ✅ I feel sleepy.

categories.name: ❌ I tea drink daily.
categories.intro:
✅ I drink tea daily.
✅ I usually have tea daily.

categories.name: Final English Mastery Formula
categories.intro:
Grammar
+
Natural Usage
+
Context
+
Correct Verb Choice
+
Word Order
+
Native Expression
Natural English Mastery

categories.intro:
Student:
गलत English पहचान सके
awkward English सुधार सके
natural English बना सके
Indian-English mistakes समझ सके
native-like expression समझ सके
confident communication कर सके
real-world English mastery प्राप्त कर सके।
End part 2
